subcodes.first_line: O nightingale of the divine garden! Yesterday a letter was written and tomorrow it shall be dispatched. At this moment, the revered Afnán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب بوستان الهی دیروز مکتوبی مرقوم و فردا ارسال میشود و الان حضرت افنان
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
